Question: Repeat Example 15.1 for an ac source of amplitude 20 V and frequency 100 Hz.
Answer: a. $$( 20 \text{V} ) \text{sin} 200 \pi t \text{,} ( 0.20 \text{A} ) \text{sin} 200 \pi t$$ ; b. $$( 20 \text{V} ) \text{sin} 200 \pi t \text{,} ( 0.13 \text{A} ) \text{sin} ( 200 \pi t + \pi \text{/} 2 )$$ ; c. $$( 20 \text{V} ) \text{sin} 200 \pi t \text{,} ( 2.1 \text{A} ) \text{sin} ( 200 \pi t - \pi \text{/} 2 )$$
